en.text: in the oblique cases there is used instead of it a (probably cognate) name Δίς , which is otherwise obsolete; Zeus or Dis (among the Latins, Jupiter or Jove), the supreme deity of the Greeks

senses.gloss_en: in the oblique cases there is used instead of it a (probably cognate) name Δίς , which is otherwise obsolete; Zeus or Dis (among the Latins, Jupiter or Jove), the supreme deity of the Greeks
